question: Across the days shown, how does the total number of visits from Search compare to the total number of visits from Direct?

options.A: Search has slightly more total visits than Direct
options.B: Search has about half as many total visits as Direct
options.C: Search and Direct have roughly the same total visits
options.D: Search has far fewer total visits than Direct

explanation: The y-axis starts at 1500 instead of 0, which compresses the visible differences between stacked totals. That can make Direct look as large as (or larger than) Search even though the totals favor Search.
